text.title: SLO Burn-Rate Review Protocol Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying slo-burn-rate-review-protocol must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: attendees missing any of architect / oncall_lead / product_rep
review note committed > 2h after meeting end

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
